audit_items.proof_trace: All dynamic allocations in nfp_main.c are freed on every execution path. The cleanup ladder in nfp_pci_probe (err_net_remove → err_fw_unload → err_hwinfo_free → err_cpp_free → err_disable_msix → err_pci_priv_unset) correctly pairs each allocation (devlink, workqueue, cpp, hwinfo, eth_tbl, nspi, mip, rtbl, dumpspec) with its corresponding free. nfp_nsp_init frees eth_tbl and nspi internally on its error paths before returning, and nfp_fw_load always reaches release_firmware via exit_release_fw regardless of the path taken. __nfp_pci_shutdown exhaustively frees all resources on the removal path.
